mantenimiento.subtitulo: Preventive, corrective and predictive maintenance programs to maximize availability and extend the service life of your equipment.
queIncluye: Preventive maintenance based on operating hours or calendar
Fault diagnosis and root cause analysis
mantenimiento.cierreTexto: Reduce unplanned downtime. Let's talk about a maintenance plan for your plant.

montaje.subtitulo: Complete mechanical installation from equipment reception on site to commissioning-ready handover.
queIncluye: Pre-assembly and assembly of rotor, stator and casing
Auxiliary systems installation (lubrication oil, cooling, control)
montaje.cierreTexto: Ensure a manufacturer-standard compliant assembly. Contact us for your next project.

puesta-en-marcha.subtitulo: We turn an installed unit into an operational, reliable generation asset with formal handover to the client.
puesta-en-marcha.cierreTexto: Move from construction to operation with technical confidence and full documentation.

alineacion.subtitulo: Laser alignment between turbine, gearbox and generator to eliminate vibration, reduce wear and protect your investment.
queIncluye: Soft foot and base flatness verification
alineacion.cierreTexto: Good alignment can add years to equipment life. Request a one-time or scheduled service.

asesoria.subtitulo: Independent consulting to support the most critical technical decisions for your plant.
queIncluye: Second technical opinion on third-party proposals
Support in technical negotiations with manufacturers

suministros.subtitulo: Management of original and alternative spare parts, plus specialized tools for turbine interventions.
suministros.cierreTexto: Reduce downtime with the right supply chain.
